business_ideas.idea: VPN built into WiFi router as default security feature, simplifying setup.
Data visualization platform for grocery store purchases from Safeway/Kroger.
Marketplace matching schools needing solar with companies seeking tax credits.
Replace highway median grass with artificial turf to reduce water usage.
Fort Knox for baseball cards: centralized vault storage with fractional trading.
Group buying SaaS platform for software discounts (AppSumo-like for all products).
Align: income share agreement infrastructure for education programs.
AgentFire: Wix for real estate agents to build sites and business.
Productize service businesses into SaaS products for niche markets.

predictions.text: Privacy pendulum swinging: more consumers will care about data privacy over time.
WiFi router with built-in VPN will become expected feature, high margin business.
Solar-as-a-service model will expand to churches and other tax-seeking organizations.
